zh.title: 城市地标雕塑
zh.description: 位于城市中心的大型地标雕塑，高20米，采用不锈钢材质，展现城市的现代气息。

zh.title: 公园主题雕塑
zh.description: 为城市公园设计的主题雕塑，融合了自然元素和人文精神，成为公园的焦点。

zh.title: 企业形象雕塑
zh.description: 为知名企业设计的形象雕塑，体现企业的文化理念和价值观。

zh.title: 历史文化雕塑
zh.description: 以历史文化为主题的雕塑，展现了当地的历史底蕴和文化特色。

en.title: City Landmark Sculpture
en.description: A large landmark sculpture located in the city center, 20 meters high, made of stainless steel, showcasing the modern atmosphere of the city.

en.title: Park Theme Sculpture
en.description: A theme sculpture designed for the city park, integrating natural elements and humanistic spirit, becoming the focus of the park.

en.title: Corporate Image Sculpture
en.description: An image sculpture designed for a well-known enterprise, reflecting the enterprise's cultural philosophy and values.

en.title: Historical Cultural Sculpture
en.description: A sculpture with historical and cultural themes, showcasing the local historical heritage and cultural characteristics.
